anomalies.title: Negative or zero operating result
anomalies.description: Operating expenses meet or exceed operating revenue.
anomalies.evidence: Net operating result is $-329,146 on $1,877,724 of revenue.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review revenue shortfalls and expense drivers by department.

anomalies.title: Negative or low cash flow
anomalies.description: Net cash flow is at or below the configured minimum.
anomalies.evidence: Net cash flow is $-685,996; ending cash is $4,739,362.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review operating, scholarship, and capital cash outflows.

anomalies.title: Payroll exceeds revenue threshold
anomalies.description: Payroll cost is above the configured maximum share of revenue.
anomalies.evidence: Calculated payroll/revenue is 53.10% versus a 42.00% maximum.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review payroll by department, overtime, benefits, and headcount.

anomalies.title: Tuition collection below target
anomalies.description: Student payment collections are below the configured minimum.
anomalies.evidence: Collection rate is 84.45% from $1,139,707 paid against $1,349,634 due.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Inspect overdue invoices, aging buckets, and payment plans.

anomalies.title: Overdue student payments above limit
anomalies.description: The share of overdue student invoices exceeds policy.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review student receivables by aging and department.

anomalies.title: Vendor payment exceeds review threshold
anomalies.description: At least one vendor payment exceeds the configured review value.
anomalies.evidence: Maximum payment is $96,000 versus a $50,000 threshold.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Inspect the underlying vendor invoice, approval, and duplicate checks.

anomalies.title: Engineering overspending exceeds flag threshold
anomalies.description: Department actual expenses materially exceed budget.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Inspect department expense categories, payroll, and vendors.

anomalies.title: Health Sciences overspending exceeds flag threshold
anomalies.description: Department actual expenses materially exceed budget.
anomalies.evidence: Health Sciences spent $658,959 against $566,100 budget (16.40% variance).
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Inspect department expense categories, payroll, and vendors.

anomalies.title: Equipment category overspending
anomalies.description: Expense category actual value exceeds its budget range.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review the category by department and underlying transactions.

anomalies.title: Facilities category outside budget target
anomalies.description: Expense category actual value exceeds its budget range.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review the category by department and underlying transactions.

anomalies.title: Payroll category outside budget target
anomalies.description: Expense category actual value exceeds its budget range.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review the category by department and underlying transactions.
